acceptance_targets: [chapter_10_award_001] Pass if the revised equivalents of `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:205`, `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:209`, and `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:211` progress in three distinct beats and only one of those beats explicitly states that the sky, stars, or pressure are unchanged; fail if two or more of those paragraphs still restate the same contrast in different wording.

[chapter_10_craft_001] Pass if the revised equivalents of `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:7`, `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:9`, `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:111`, `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:177`, `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:179`, and `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:197` are all grammatically complete narration sentences; fail if any of those beats still relies on a standalone fragment whose effect comes from dropping the main clause.

[chapter_10_prose_001] Pass if the revised equivalents of `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:13`, `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:67`, and `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:131` no longer stack the same 'almost/not quite' hedge more than once across those three moments, and if only one of `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:189`, `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:205`, or `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:211` still uses an explicit same-or-unchanged construction; fail if both patterns remain repeated in the revised passage.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the revised equivalents of `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:205`, `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:209`, and `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:211` progress in three distinct beats and only one of those beats explicitly states that the sky, stars, or pressure are unchanged; fail if two or more of those paragraphs still restate the same contrast in different wording.
findings.evidence: The final movement states the chapter's central contrast three times instead of landing it once: `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:205`, `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:209`, `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:211`.
findings.problem: The ending keeps re-explaining the same insight after the physical ward-contact has already made it legible: Christmas warmth stayed intact inside the castle while the wards thinned outside it. That extra restatement costs the chapter's last turn some of its sting and keeps the ending just short of shortlist-level compression.
findings.rewrite_direction: Tighten the final sequence at `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:205`, `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:209`, and `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:211` so each paragraph does different work: one paragraph can hold the ordinary human inventory, one can name Gavin's embodied knowledge that the wards are thinner, and the last should add a fresh consequence or image rather than another unchanged-sky restatement.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the revised equivalents of `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:7`, `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:9`, `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:111`, `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:177`, `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:179`, and `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:197` are all grammatically complete narration sentences; fail if any of those beats still relies on a standalone fragment whose effect comes from dropping the main clause.
findings.evidence: The narration repeatedly uses clipped fragments that the constitution explicitly disallows: `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:7`, `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:9`, `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:111`, `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:177`, `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:179`, `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:197`.
findings.problem: The chapter leans on narrative fragments such as 'At the foot of his bed, three things.' and 'Crackers.' for emphasis. In this project that is not just a stylistic preference; it violates the constitution's ban on elliptical clipping and nudges Gavin's otherwise plain register toward mannered shorthand.
findings.rewrite_direction: Recast the clipped narration at `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:7`, `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:9`, `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:111`, `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:177`, `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:179`, and `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:197` into full grammatical sentences with explicit subjects and finite verbs, keeping the rhythm but removing omitted main clauses used purely for punch.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the revised equivalents of `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:13`, `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:67`, and `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:131` no longer stack the same 'almost/not quite' hedge more than once across those three moments, and if only one of `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:189`, `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:205`, or `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:211` still uses an explicit same-or-unchanged construction; fail if both patterns remain repeated in the revised passage.
findings.evidence: The chapter reuses the same sentence logic of near-miss qualification and sameness too often: `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:13`, `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:67`, `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:131`, `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:189`, `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:205`, `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:211`.
findings.problem: Phrases built on 'almost/not quite' and then the late-scene 'same/unchanged' refrain recur often enough to read as a chapter tic rather than fresh perception. The repetition is mild, but it flattens prose that is otherwise sharp and specific.
findings.rewrite_direction: Vary the sentence shapes at `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:13`, `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:67`, and `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:131` so each object or action fails in its own specific way instead of through another 'almost/not quite' hedge. Then keep only one explicit sameness refrain across `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:189`, `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:205`, and `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:211`.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Preserve productive dialogue roughness; do not clean living speech into balanced thesis statements.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: This novel's central risk is tonal: it must sustain dark comedy, cosmic horror, and genuine emotional tenderness in the same narrative without any register canceling the others. Lean into the discomfort of juxtaposition. A scene where Gavin is mentally modeling ward-substrate decay while a classmate screams under the Cruciatus Curse is not a failure of empathy — it is the novel's core tension made visceral. The humor of the premise — that Voldemort's war is an irritating distraction from the real problem — must never be defused by making Gavin feel appropriately guilty at the right moments. He should feel guilty sometimes and not other times, and the reader should sit with the discomfort of a protagonist whose priorities have become genuinely alien. The cosmic material should be rendered with enough specificity that it is genuinely unsettling, not just philosophically interesting. Do not soften the ending: Gavin's refusal to intervene in the Battle of Hogwarts must be played straight, without a last-minute redemptive gesture or moral safety net.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: Euphemism in this novel is a particularly acute failure because the entire thematic engine runs on the difference between seeing something directly and not seeing it. Gavin's journey is toward unmediated perception. The prose must mirror that commitment. When the Carrows torture a student, render the torture. When Gavin is hit with the Cruciatus, render the pain in his body. When the cosmic threat presses against perception, render what it feels like — do not retreat to abstractions about 'something vast' or 'an incomprehensible presence.' Find the specific sensory detail that makes the incomprehensible land. Euphemism in a novel about the failure to see what is real is thematic self-sabotage.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: High — contractions are the norm for all dialogue. Uncontracted forms are reserved for deliberate emphasis, Babbling's academic register, or moments where a character is being pointedly formal. If a line reads stiffly, check contractions first.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate chapter textures aggressively. A high-intensity chapter (Cruciatus detention, Duncan's torture) must be followed by a chapter with a different pressure profile — quieter, more internal, more comic, or more focused on intellectual work. No two consecutive chapters should share the same dominant emotional register, the same scene-structure (e.g., two chapters that each build to a confrontation), or the same pacing profile. Vary scene count, dialogue density, and the ratio of interiority to action. Some chapters should be mostly one extended scene; others should move across multiple locations and timeframes. The Christmas chapter and the work-routine chapters should breathe differently from the Carrow chapters and the battle chapter.
prose_style_profile.diction: Plain, concrete, specific. Anglo-Saxon roots preferred over Latinate where both are available. Avoid poetic diction, literary allusion, and metaphors that call attention to their own cleverness. Metaphors should arise from Gavin's actual frame of reference: schoolwork, the castle, ordinary physical experience. When the First Art requires description, reach for precision over beauty — describe what it looks like, not what it means. The novel's most striking language should come from the collision between ordinary diction and extraordinary perception.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: Close third person, locked to Gavin's perception throughout. The narrative voice has access to his thoughts, feelings, and sensory experience but not to anyone else's interiority. Other characters are known only through what Gavin observes. As the First Art restructures Gavin's cognition, the narrative's perceptual range should gradually expand — he begins noticing things no one else can see — but the voice remains grounded in his ordinary, slightly bewildered perspective. The narration should never become more articulate or literary than Gavin himself would be; the strangeness of what he perceives should press against the ordinariness of how he describes it.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Varied and responsive to scene pressure. Default rhythm is medium-paced prose with sentences of mixed length — some short, some compound, none habitually long. During scenes of intellectual discovery, let sentences extend as Gavin's attention extends, then cut short when comprehension fails. During Carrow scenes, prose should tighten and become more physical. During quiet scenes, allow room for observation and sensory detail without rushing toward the next event. Do not develop a signature rhythm that persists across all chapters — the rhythm should be the scene's rhythm, not the author's.
